sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FundX激進主動型ETF-XNAV-ETF基本資料
feed.summary: This article provides detailed fundamental information for the FundX Aggressive ETF (XNAV), including its issuer, trading details, size, market price, net asset value, fees, and investment strategy. The ETF is actively managed and aims for long-term capital appreciation by investing primarily in aggressive and sector-specific equity ETFs, which may utilize complex investment technologies and derivatives.

feed.title: W&T Offshore Q2 2025 Earnings Preview
feed.summary: This article is an earnings preview for W&T Offshore's Q2 2025 financial results. It focuses on analyst expectations for revenue and EPS, highlighting the consensus estimates. The article also mentions the company's past performance and future guidance.

feed.title: WeRide enters Slovakia, expanding autonomous driving footprint to 12 countries
feed.summary: WeRide, a Chinese autonomous driving technology company, is expanding its global presence by entering the Slovakian market, making it its fourth European market and 12th country overall. The company has partnered with Elevate Slovakia to launch a national-level commercial autonomous driving project, deploying various products including robotaxis and Robobuses for passenger transport, parcel delivery, and municipal services. Road tests are scheduled to begin in Bratislava in the first half of 2026, with plans for nationwide expansion. WeRide, which surpassed 1,000 operational robotaxis in January, aims to have tens of thousands globally by 2030, and was listed on Nasdaq in October 2024 and HKEX in November 2025.

feed.title: TeraWulf (NASDAQ:WULF) Earns Buy Rating from Rosenblatt Securities
feed.summary: Rosenblatt Securities has reissued a "Buy" rating for TeraWulf (NASDAQ:WULF) with a $23 price target, suggesting a potential upside of over 50%. The company, a zero-carbon bitcoin mining operator, holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts. Insider activity shows Director Michael C. Bucella recently purchased additional shares, and institutional investors also hold significant stakes.

feed.title: Viatris to Outline its Vision for Sustained Revenue and Earnings Growth Through 2030
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. is hosting an investor event to detail its strategic vision and financial framework for sustained revenue and earnings growth through 2030. The company anticipates a stronger portfolio with higher-margin generics and innovative pipeline products, expecting over $11 billion in cash for deployment to support capital returns and disciplined business development. Viatris projects a combined long-term target of 5-6% Total Revenues CAGR, 7-8% Adjusted EBITDA CAGR, and 9-10% Adjusted EPS CAGR through 2030.

feed.title: PPG selects Colours, Inc. as 2025 Automotive Refinish Platinum Distributor of the Year
feed.summary: PPG has named Colours, Inc. of Wilkes-Barre, Pa., as its Automotive Refinish 2025 Platinum Distributor of the Year. This marks the third time Colours, Inc. has received this recognition, which highlights exceptional service, loyalty, and product knowledge within the PPG Platinum Distributor program. Colours, Inc. operates over 50 locations and has been part of the PPG Platinum Distributor network since its inception in 1994.

feed.title: Prologis and GIC Form $1.6 billion U.S. Build-to-Suit Logistics Joint Venture
feed.summary: Prologis, Inc. and GIC have created a $1.6 billion joint venture for build-to-suit logistics facilities across major U.S. markets. This partnership, which includes an initial 4.1 million square feet, will leverage Prologis' development expertise with GIC's institutional capital to meet growing demand for customized distribution networks. The venture aims to capitalize on strong e-commerce growth, supply chain reshoring, and sustained consumer spending in North America's industrial sector.

feed.title: AES raises potential bondholder fees and extends debt vote to March 24
feed.summary: AES has successfully obtained the necessary consents for its 2032 Senior Notes, leading to the execution of a supplemental indenture that will be activated upon the pending Merger's closing and payment of consent fees. Concurrently, the company extended the consent solicitations for its 2028, 2030, and 2031 notes until March 24, 2026, and modified the consent-fee structure to a variable rate between $2.50 and $5.00 per $1,000 principal. These actions are all contingent on the consummation of the Merger, anticipated in late 2026 or early 2027, with no payments or amendments becoming operative if the Merger does not occur.

feed.title: Kroger Appoints Milen Mahadevan Chief Data and AI Officer
feed.summary: Kroger has appointed Milen Mahadevan as its new Chief Data and AI Officer, a newly created position aimed at integrating advanced AI capabilities into the company's business processes. Mahadevan will continue his role as President and CEO of Kroger's data analytics subsidiary, 84.51°, while also overseeing Kroger’s data and AI platform and customer technology teams. His appointment unifies the company’s data and AI functions under a single leadership structure, leveraging his extensive experience in data management and analytics within Kroger since 2015.

feed.title: Western Alliance Bank taps Fiserv for Clover platform
feed.summary: Western Alliance Bank has partnered with Fiserv to offer its clients Fiserv's commerce and business management technology, including the Clover point-of-sale system. This collaboration is Fiserv's largest agent bank partnership by asset size, expanding its footprint in the Western US. The partnership aims to provide Western Alliance Bank's clients with scalable and secure payment technology for in-store, online, and mobile transactions.

feed.title: Lawsuit: CVS Caremark inflated drug costs via ‘manipulation scheme’
feed.summary: CVS Caremark is facing a lawsuit filed by a roofers' union, alleging the company inflated prescription drug costs through a "Formulary Manipulation Scheme." The lawsuit claims Caremark used its control over drug formularies to favor higher-cost medications, channeling payments through its subsidiary Zinc Health Services instead of securing better rebates for clients. This practice allegedly led to increased costs for plan sponsors and members, leading the union to seek recovery of losses and other damages.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson-Protagonist Therapeutics Partnered New Psoriasis Pill Wins FDA Nod, Shakes Up Competition With AbbVie
feed.summary: The FDA has approved Icotyde (icotrokinra), a new oral IL-23 receptor antagonist developed by Johnson & Johnson and Protagonist Therapeutics, for moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis. This approval triggers a $50 million milestone payment to Protagonist and is expected to shake up the competition, particularly with AbbVie's Skyrizi, although analysts believe Skyrizi remains well-positioned due to its strong efficacy and quarterly administration. The introduction of an oral therapy like Icotyde is anticipated to expand the overall psoriasis market.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Valuation In Focus As Analyst Upgrades Lift Profit Expectations
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) is under renewed scrutiny following analyst upgrades and expectations of significant year-over-year earnings per share growth. While a "most popular narrative" suggests the stock is 25.8% overvalued with a fair value of $44.08, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model from Simply Wall St indicates the shares are trading at a 34.1% discount, implying a fair value of $84.20. The article highlights mixed sentiment and encourages investors to weigh these differing valuation perspectives against the risks and rewards of copper exposure.

feed.title: A Look At Sempra (SRE) Valuation After Earnings Miss And Investor Investigation
feed.summary: Sempra (SRE) is under scrutiny following an earnings miss and a legal investigation, yet its share price has shown a 39.03% one-year return. Analysts estimate a fair value of $101.50, suggesting the stock is currently undervalued at $95.04, based on projected earnings growth. However, a different valuation view based on P/E ratios indicates Sempra trades at a premium compared to its industry peers, highlighting a split view on its current valuation.

feed.title: Worksport Presents New Premium "Game Changer" Tonneau Cover Model to Industry Buyers at Keystone BIG Show; Initiates Pre-Orders Ahead of Near-Term Commercial Launch
feed.summary: Worksport Ltd. announced the development of a new premium tonneau cover model, which it debuted at the Keystone BIG Show, generating significant buyer interest and initiating pre-orders. Dubbed a "game changer," this new model is designed for the professional and commercial truck market and is a key part of Worksport's 2026 growth strategy to expand its U.S. dealer network. The company also announced an upcoming earnings call for March 26, 2026, to discuss its operational progress and financial outlook.

feed.title: Walmart stores partially closing in Texas for renovations. See list
feed.summary: Several Walmart Neighborhood Market stores across multiple states, including two in Texas (Sachse and Killeen), will undergo partial closures for four weeks in April for renovations. The main sales floor will be closed, but pharmacies and fuel stations will remain operational. These rapid remodels aim to create a brighter, more inviting, and easier-to-navigate shopping experience with expanded aisles and reconfigured layouts.

feed.title: This cruise stock is down sharply since U.S.-Iran war began. Morgan Stanley says buy the dip
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has upgraded Carnival (CCL) to overweight, despite cutting its net revenue yield forecast due to potentially softer European demand stemming from the Middle East conflict and rising oil prices. Analyst Jamie Rollo noted that significant drops in Carnival's stock price following past geopolitical events (like the 2003 Iraqi War and 2022 Russia-Ukraine War) have typically been followed by substantial rebounds, making the current dip an attractive buying opportunity. Rollo believes the cruise industry is better positioned to manage downturns now, citing cruising's relative attractiveness and Carnival's strong free cash flow.

feed.title: Arista Networks Is Up 230% in Three Years and Analysts See 140% More
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) has seen a 230% increase in stock value over three years, with analysts projecting an additional 140% upside based on strong Q4 2025 results and optimistic Q1 2026 guidance. The company's success is largely driven by its high-speed ethernet switches and routers for AI data centers, significantly increasing its AI networking revenue target for 2026 to $3.25 billion. Despite increasing memory and silicon costs, Arista maintains strong operating margins, outperforming competitors like Cisco, and analysts believe its AI networking growth cycle is not yet fully priced into the stock.

feed.title: 3M, Bain Capital Partner for $1.95B Fire Safety Company Purchase
feed.summary: Manufacturing giant 3M is partnering with investment firm Bain Capital to acquire Madison Fire & Rescue from Madison Industries in a $1.95 billion deal. This acquisition will form a new joint venture focused on fire and safety equipment, with 3M holding a 50.1% stake and Bain Capital 49.9%. 3M will merge its Scott Safety division into the new venture and receive $700 million in cash upon the transaction's expected closure in late 2026.

feed.title: ENPHASE ENERGY, INC. (ENPH) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for Enphase Energy, Inc. (ENPH) investors regarding a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased shares between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm regarding their legal options. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made misrepresentations about its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate effects from a product credit termination.

feed.title: W&T Offshore, Inc. (NYSE:WTI) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: W&T Offshore, Inc. held its Q4 2025 earnings call, highlighting solid operational and financial results, including increased production, enhanced liquidity, and reduced debt. The company emphasized its strategy of focusing on cash flow generation, optimizing existing assets, and opportunistically pursuing accretive acquisitions rather than high-risk drilling. W&T Offshore also discussed proposed positive regulatory changes that could reduce financial assurance burdens for Gulf of Mexico operators and its commitment to returning value to shareholders through dividends.

feed.title: PAYPAL HOLDINGS, INC. (PYPL) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) investors regarding an upcoming deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made misrepresentations concerning its 2027 financial targets and the growth trajectory of its core branded checkout segment. Investors who purchased PayPal stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, are encouraged to contact Bernstein Liebhard LLP to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: ORACLE CORPORATION (ORCL) SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a shareholder alert for Oracle Corporation (ORCL) investors regarding an upcoming deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased Oracle shares between June 12, 2025, and December 16, 2025, and suffered losses, are encouraged to inquire about their legal rights and options. The lawsuit alleges that Oracle made misrepresentations about its data center contracts for AI infrastructure and its ability to achieve accelerated revenue growth through capital expenditures.

feed.title: Triumph Capital Management Trims Stake in Intel Corporation $INTC
feed.summary: Triumph Capital Management significantly reduced its stake in Intel Corporation by 45.6% during the third quarter, selling 11,644 shares and retaining 13,911 shares valued at $467,000. Despite this, many other institutional investors, including Vanguard, State Street, and Capital World Investors, increased their exposure, and Norges Bank opened a new position worth approximately $1.58 billion, resulting in institutions owning about 64.53% of Intel's stock. Intel recently surpassed quarterly EPS estimates and provided positive guidance, with the stock trading near $45, though analysts largely rate it as "Reduce."

feed.title: General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE: GIS) missed Q3 2026 earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $0.64 against an expected $0.728. The company emphasized its strategic investments in brand remarkability to improve household penetration, baseline volume, distribution, and market share, with most of the reinvestment phase now complete. General Mills reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 guidance and expects a significant step up in financial performance in Q4 and fiscal 2027, driven by improved competitive pricing, innovation, and a focus on profitable global brands, alongside the divestiture of its less profitable Brazil business.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE:WSM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, exceeding expectations with an EPS of $3.04 against an estimated $2.9. The company demonstrated strong performance across its brands, notably Williams Sonoma, West Elm, and Pottery Barn Kids, driven by newness, collaborations, and a resilient consumer response despite a dynamic environment of tariffs and unpredictable logistics. Looking ahead to fiscal 2026, Williams-Sonoma anticipates accelerated growth, enhanced customer service, and continued earnings driven by strategic investments in retail expansion, product innovation, and the leveraging of AI, projecting net revenue comps of 2% to 6% and an operating margin of 17.5% to 18.1%.

feed.title: VHC - Virnetx Holding Latest Stock News & Market Updates
feed.summary: This page provides the latest news and updates on Virnetx Holding (VHC), an Internet security software and technology company specializing in patented Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) and secure communications. Recent news highlights include VirnetX securing a GSA Schedule contract, transferring its stock listing to Nasdaq, obtaining Department of Defense security certifications, and participating in military exercises like RIMPAC 2024 to demonstrate its secure communication technologies. The company is strategically focusing on the U.S. Department of Defense and Intelligence Community, with updates on leadership changes and ongoing collaborations.

feed.title: Argus Research Adjusts Jabil Price Target to $300 From $250, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Argus Research has increased its price target for Jabil (JBL) from $250 to $300, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the company's financial prospects. The article also notes similar price target increases from other firms including Barclays, Goldman Sachs, Stifel, Raymond James, and Baird.

feed.title: Wellgistics Management Converts $2 Million in Deferred Compensation into Equity at $0.20 per Share
feed.summary: Wellgistics Health, Inc. announced that its President and Interim CEO, Prashant Patel, along with another board member, has converted approximately $2.0 million in deferred compensation into 10 million shares of the company's common stock at $0.20 per share, a premium to recent trading prices. This move, which also included the issuance of 10 million warrants, aims to align management incentives with long-term shareholder value and underscores Mr. Patel's confidence in the company's strategic direction. The newly issued shares are subject to a 6-month lock-up agreement, further demonstrating commitment to the company's future in health information technology.

feed.title: Skill Gaming Market size to cross $164.96 Billion by 2035 |
feed.summary: The global skill gaming market, valued at USD 46.09 billion in 2025, is projected to reach USD 164.96 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 13.6% from 2026 to 2035. This growth is driven by mobile technology advancements, increasing internet penetration, and the popularity of esports, with North America expected to dominate the market. Key trends include the rise of mobile-first platforms, the integration of real-money gaming, and evolving regulatory landscapes.

feed.title: Rothschild & Co Redburn Adjusts Price Target on Verisk Analytics to $183 From $184, Maintains Sell Rating
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has lowered its price target for Verisk Analytics (VRSK) from $184 to $183, while maintaining a 'Sell' rating on the stock. Verisk Analytics specializes in providing predictive analytics and decision support solutions, primarily for the insurance industry. The company has reaffirmed its outlook for double-digit EPS growth over the next three years.

feed.title: Wellgistics chief swaps $2M in deferred pay for locked-up stock
feed.summary: Wellgistics (NASDAQ:WGRX) announced that its President and Interim CEO, Prashant Patel, along with a board participant, converted approximately $2.0 million in accrued compensation into common stock at $0.20 per share, resulting in the issuance of 10 million shares. The company also issued 10 million warrants exercisable at $0.01 for five years, with the converted shares subject to a six-month lock-up period. This move aims to align management incentives with long-term shareholder value and reduce accrued liabilities, though it introduces potential dilution for existing shareholders.

feed.title: TWO Receives Unsolicited Proposal
feed.summary: TWO (Two Harbors Investment Corp.) has received an unsolicited proposal to acquire all outstanding shares for $10.70 per share in cash, plus the $25.4 million termination fee owed to UWM Holdings Corporation (UWMC). An ad hoc committee of TWO's Board of Directors has determined this proposal could reasonably lead to a "Company Superior Proposal" under the UWMC merger agreement. The UWMC merger agreement remains in effect, and the Board continues to recommend the UWMC transaction, with a Special Meeting of Stockholders still scheduled for March 24, 2026.

feed.title: Citi's Mason plans to leave by year's end, gunning for a CEO role - report (C:NYSE)
feed.summary: Mark Mason, current executive vice chair and senior executive advisor to the CEO at Citigroup, is reportedly planning to leave the company by the end of the year. After nearly 25 years with the bank, Mason intends to pursue a CEO position elsewhere. This decision comes from a desire to take on a top leadership role.

feed.title: YY Group Announces Effective Date of Reverse Stock Split
feed.summary: YY Group Holding Limited announced a 50-for-1 reverse stock split of its Class A ordinary shares, effective March 23, 2026, under the existing ticker 'YYGH'. This action is primarily aimed at meeting Nasdaq's $1.00 minimum bid price requirement. The split will reduce outstanding shares from approximately 207.4 million to 4.1 million, with fractional shares being rounded up to one full share.

feed.title: $6B in new venues: VENU plans 20 entertainment sites in 5 years
feed.summary: Venu Holding Corporation (VENU) CEO J.W. Roth announced during an interview on Schwab Network's Opening Bell that the company plans to develop 20 new entertainment venues, representing an estimated $6 billion in development over the next five years. This expansion is fueled by a recent capital raise of $86.25 million, which surpassed the initial $75 million target due to strong investor interest. VENU aims to solidify its position as a leader in the live entertainment infrastructure with a focus on capital efficiency and long-term value creation.

feed.title: The Home Depot Teams Up with David Beckham to Bring the FIFA World Cup 2026™ To Backyards Across the Country
feed.summary: The Home Depot has partnered with David Beckham to bring the excitement of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ to fans' backyards across the country. The campaign includes sweepstakes, exclusive in-store and online offers, FIFA Fan Festivals featuring "Beckham's Backyard" immersive spaces, and soccer-themed workshops. This initiative aims to help fans create the ultimate watch party experience at home while celebrating the upcoming major event.

feed.title: New BZPACK mSiC® Power Modules Are Designed for Demanding Applications in Harsh Environments
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has introduced its new BZPACK mSiC® power modules, engineered to meet rigorous HV-H3TRB standards for demanding power-conversion environments. These modules offer exceptional reliability, versatile system integration, and streamline manufacturing with their compact, baseplate-less design and various topology options. Leveraging Microchip's advanced mSiC technology, the BZPACK modules are suited for industrial and renewable energy applications, providing superior insulation, thermal management, and long-term durability.

feed.title: WisdomTree Launches Efficient U.S. Plus International Equity Fund (NTSD)
feed.summary: WisdomTree has launched the Efficient U.S. Plus International Equity Fund (NTSD) on the NYSE, offering a capital-efficient way to add international equity exposure alongside core U.S. holdings. The actively managed fund uses a model-based approach, investing in U.S. equities and utilizing index futures for developed international equity exposure. NTSD builds on WisdomTree's existing capital-efficient ETF family and aims to help investors optimize portfolios with international diversification without significantly reducing U.S. equity allocations.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Amgen to $390 From $375, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Amgen (AMGN) to $390 from $375, while reiterating an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook for the biotechnology giant. Amgen's stock information, company profile, and other related news are also provided.

feed.title: EagleNXT eBee VISION ISR Drone Selected by U.S. Army for advanced training
feed.summary: The U.S. Army has selected EagleNXT's eBee VISION Unmanned Aircraft System (UAS) for advanced training purposes, acquiring two systems to improve hands-on unmanned systems training and operator proficiency. The eBee VISION is a lightweight, NDAA-compliant fixed-wing drone designed for rapid deployment and enhanced situational awareness, featuring long endurance, real-time high-resolution video, and a portable design. This acquisition reinforces EagleNXT's growing role in U.S. defense training, helping to prepare soldiers for multi-domain operations through realistic unmanned training scenarios focused on intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR).

feed.title: U.S. Army buys two backpack-size drones for surveillance training
feed.summary: EagleNXT (NYSE: UAVS) announced that the U.S. Army has selected two of its eBee VISION UAS systems for advanced unmanned systems training. These lightweight, NDAA-compliant fixed-wing drones offer up to 90 minutes of endurance, real-time high-resolution video, and a portable design, making them ideal for field training and enhancing the Army's ISR capabilities. The acquisition aims to improve operator proficiency and integration exercises for the next generation of warfighters.

feed.title: Uber to Invest Up to $1.25 Billion in Rivian in Robotaxi Bet
feed.summary: Uber Technologies Inc. plans to invest up to $1.25 billion in Rivian Automotive Inc. to launch a robotaxi fleet across the US, Canada, and Europe within the next five years. Uber or its fleet partners will purchase 10,000 autonomous Rivian R2 robotaxis, which will be exclusively available on the Uber app, starting in San Francisco and Miami in 2028. This collaboration aims to expand Uber's self-driving vehicle services and Rivian's presence in the robotaxi market.

feed.title: New ovarian cancer PD-L1 indication leads Agilent's USCAP showcase
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies announced it will showcase its latest advancements in precision oncology and digital pathology at the 2026 USCAP Annual Meeting. Key highlights include a new PD-L1 indication for epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal carcinoma, expanding its biomarker testing capabilities. Agilent will also demonstrate end-to-end digital pathology workflows and collaborative solutions with ecosystem partners, reinforcing its commitment to integrated, data-driven pathology.

feed.title: YY Group slashes share count to 4.1M in 50-for-1 reverse split
feed.summary: YY Group (NASDAQ: YYGH) announced a 50-for-1 reverse stock split of its Class A ordinary shares, effective March 23, 2026, to meet Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement. This action will reduce outstanding shares from approximately 207.4 million to about 4.1 million, with shareholders receiving whole shares instead of fractional ones. The market reacted negatively, with YYGH shares declining 22.70% following the news.

feed.title: MDJM heads to OTC trading as Nasdaq suspension takes effect March 20
feed.summary: MDJM LTD (UOKA) announced that its shares will be suspended from Nasdaq trading effective March 20, 2026, due to failing to maintain a closing bid price of $0.10 or above for 10 consecutive business days. The company plans to request a hearing before an independent Nasdaq Hearings Panel and expects its securities to be eligible for trading on the OTC Markets during this period. MDJM previously effected a 1-for-25 reverse stock split on March 16, 2026, as it explores options to regain Nasdaq compliance.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Unveils Top 5 Pizza Trends for 2026: Calabrian Chili, Brisket, and Global Fusion Lead the Menu
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has announced its top five pizza trends for 2026, ahead of the International Pizza Expo. These trends highlight the growing consumer demand for specialized heat like Calabrian chili, premium proteins such as brisket, and globally inspired "passport pies." The company emphasizes the strategic importance of Limited Time Offers (LTOs) and innovative crusts in driving customer interest and traffic.

feed.title: United's new Dreamliner puts 99 premium seats on Singapore route
feed.summary: United Airlines has started selling tickets for its new Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner, featuring 99 premium seats and eight Polaris Studio suites. The inaugural international flight on this "Elevated" interior aircraft will be from San Francisco to Singapore on April 22, 2026. This move highlights United's focus on product differentiation and upgrading its long-haul service with enhanced amenities like 27-inch 4K OLED screens and lie-flat seating.

feed.title: Hanskin Lands in 1,400 ULTA Beauty Stores, Bringing Glass Skin Hydration to the U.S.
feed.summary: K-Beauty brand Hanskin is significantly expanding its North American presence by launching in approximately 1,400 ULTA Beauty stores across the United States. This move brings its bestselling Hyaluron Skin Essence, known for achieving a glass skin glow, to a broader consumer base. Hanskin is also introducing advanced biotech-driven PDRN skincare, including the Ara Lotus PDRN Hyaluron Glow Serum, which utilizes a proprietary plant-based PDRN technology for enhanced elasticity and radiance.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants beats FQ3 outlook, raises profit and sales guidance for FY26 (DRI:NYSE)
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants reported strong third-quarter results, surpassing Wall Street expectations for sales and adjusted profit, driven by robust traffic at Longhorn Steakhouse. Despite a decline in unadjusted profits due to impairments, the company has raised its sales and EPS guidance for fiscal year 2026, indicating a positive outlook.
